chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.3221 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 28.01.2026 M/s Muhammad Sarwar & Deepak Kumar, advocates for applicant Mr. Sharafuddin Kanhar, A.P.G. ------------------------------------------------ Applicants/accused Mst. Rida Kanwal and Mst. Shaista Arshi are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned counsel for applicants, along with his statement, has filed copy of order dated 21.01.2026, passed by learned Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate-XIV, Karachi South, in Criminal Case No.466/2026, arising out of FIR No.809/2025 for offence under Section 489-F, PC of P.S. Defence, Karachi, whereby the applicants/accused were acquitted of the charge by way of compromise. In view of such position, learned counsel for applicants does not press the instant criminal bail application, which is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
